title: Quantity and Color in My Day
titleJp: 多い と 少ない
theme: Write about quantities and the color white in your daily life — what you have many of, what you have little of, and what you see around you.

prompts.prompt: Start your composition. Write about things you have many of at school — books, flowers, or friends.
prompts.model: 学校に 本が 多いです。毎日 たくさん 読みます。

prompts.prompt: Continue your composition. Write about something you have only a little of today — time, books, or Japanese words you know.
prompts.model: 今日は 時間が 少ないです。少し 日本語を 話しました。

prompts.prompt: Continue your composition. Write about something white you see — flowers outside, clouds, or something at school.
prompts.model: 外に 白い 花が あります。とても きれいです。

prompts.prompt: Continue your composition. Write about how much time you have for Japanese — reading, speaking, or writing.
prompts.model: 毎日 日本語を 話す 時間が あります。日本語は とても おもしろいです。

prompts.prompt: Continue your composition. Write about whether you have many or few friends to speak Japanese with — and what you want to do.
prompts.model: 日本語を 話す 友だちが 少ないです。毎日 たくさん 話したいです。

prompts.prompt: Finish your composition. Write about the girls and boys you see at school — do they usually speak Japanese?
prompts.model: 学校に 少女と 少年が います。たいてい 日本語を 話しています。

conjugations.meaning: polite negative — does not speak / read / rest
is doing — ongoing action or state

conjugations.pattern: [verb ます-stem] + たいです / たくないです

conjugations.meaning: polite past adjective — was many / was few / was white (irregular: いい → よかったです)
